title: Princesita
overview: Twelve-year-old Tamara lives within a cult that is ruled by the beliefs of its leader Miguel, who becomes obsessively convinced that Tamara is the "chosen one". But when she falls in love with a classmate, Tamara's relationship gets in the way of Miguel's objective, and he will seek her absolute obedience.

trailers.title: 「聖なる飼育」予告
trailers.channel_name: アット エンタテインメント公式
